context.quote_text: “ when he knows who they are ! He takes them now for people of fashion . ”

“ Why is he so altered ? From what can it proceed ? It can not be for _ me _ , it can not be for _ my _ sake that his manners are thus softened . My reproofs at Hunsford could not work such a change as this . It is impossible that he should still love me . ”
“ informed us that you would certainly not be here till to - morrow ; and , indeed , before we left Bakewell , we understood that you were not immediately expected in the country . ”
“ They will join me early to - morrow , ”
